Guymon Pioneer Days Rodeo

Guymon, Okla., May 1-3

All-around cowboy: Coleman Proctor, $6,846, team roping and steer roping.

Bareback riding: 1. Carson Hildre, 87 points on Double J Rodeo Company's Cafe Risque, $3,514; 2. (tie) Daxtyn Feild and Logan Patterson, 82.5, $2,342 each; 4. (tie) Bryce Eck and Tim O'Connell, 82, $1,054 each; 6. (tie) Colt Eck and Lane McGehee, 81, $527 each; 8. (tie) Cooper Filipek, Payton Lackey, Gauge McBride and Ty Pope, 80, $88 each.

(tie) Winsten McGraw and Gavin Soileau, 3.9, $1,611 each; 5. Cody Devers, 4.0, $1,143; 6. (tie) Trace Harris and Rhett Witt, 4.1, $675 each; 8. (tie) Tristan Martin, Cole Pugh and Sawyer Strand, 4.3, $69 each. Semi-finals: 1. Trell Etbauer, 3.6 seconds, $2,390; 2. (tie) Tristan Martin and Jace Melvin, 4.0, $1,923 each; 4. (tie) Trace Harris and Seth Peterson, 4.2, $1,299 each; 6. (tie) Dane Haas and Riley Westhaver, 4.4, $675 each; 8. Trey Bohmbach, 4.7, $208. Average: 1. Bull riding: 1. Eyer Morrison, 87.5 points on Double J Rodeo Company's Aftershock, $3,807; 2. (tie) Koby Jacobson and Jeter Lawrence, 85.5, $2,538 each; 4. Damien Wood, 81.5, $1,396; 5. (tie) Jace Hensley, Fulton Rutland and Ethan Winckler, 80, $677 each; 8. Scott Wells, 79, $381.

Total payoff: $314,795. Stock Contractor: Frontier Rodeo. Sub-Contractors: Coy Thompson, Jace Honey, Championship Pro Rodeo, Trell Etbauer and Double J Rodeo Company. Rodeo Secretary: Amanda Sanders. Officials: Kent Crouch, Wade Woolstenhulme, Joe Bob Locke and Chuck Hoss. Timers: Joyce Short and Jodi Crippen. Announcers: Andy Stewart and Ken Stonecipher. Specialty Act: Johnny Dudley. Bullfighters: Austin Ashley, Knox Dunn and Nathan Jestes. Clown/Barrelman: Johnny Dudley. Flankmen: Heath Stewart and Dusty Duba. Chute Bosses: Boom Boom Burleson and Tom Neuens. Pickup Men: Paul Peterson, Shawn Calhoun and Dusty Moore. Music Director: Joshua Hilton. Photographer: Dale Hirschman.
